accurate.why: All dollar amounts, extension dates, and program descriptions match the bill text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the act temporarily extends FAA programs, aviation authorities, and trust fund taxes.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly describes amendments to title 49 and the Internal Revenue Code.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the obligation authority through September 30, 2024, and the 39% apportionment reduction condition.

effective_dates.why: Correctly identifies May 10 and May 11, 2024, extension dates.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers all major provisions including AIP, FAA operations, facilities, EAS, trust fund, aviation taxes, and counter-UAS.

concise.why: Extremely detailed, listing every individual program extension; more comprehensive than a summary requires.

correct_entities.why: FAA, DOT, Airport and Airway Trust Fund, Essential Air Service, and DHS counter-UAS all correctly named.

correct_figures.why: All dollar amounts and dates match the bill text.
